title: Tunisian Turkey Tagine with Neck
description: A hearty and aromatic stew originating from Tunisia, made with tender turkey, rich neck, and fragrant spices.

ingredients.name: Tunisian spice blend
ingredients.notes: available at North African or Middle Eastern markets

instructions: Heat oil in a large Dutch oven over medium heat.
Add onion and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add garlic and cook for 1 minute.
Add turkey neck and cook until browned, about 5 minutes.
Add turkey breast, Tunisian spice blend, carrots, potatoes, and apricots. Cook for 5 minutes.
Add chicken broth and bring to a boil.
Cover and transfer to the oven. Braise for 2 hours, or until meat is tender.
Serve hot, garnished with fresh parsley or cilantro.
